name: Quaker's Not-so-Sinful Brownies
recipeIngredient: 4 Egg whites or 2 eggs, slightly beaten
1 cup Quaker Oats (uncooked) - quick or old fashion
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 250°F.
2. Lightly spray the bottom only of a 13 x 9-inch baking pan with non-stick cooking spray.
3. In a large saucepan, melt oil and chocolate over low heat, stirring frequently.
4. Remove from heat and stir in granulated sugar until dissolved.
5. Stir in applesauce until combined.
6. Add egg whites and vanilla extract; mix well.
7. Mix in oats, flour, baking powder, and salt.
8. Spread evenly into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 22 to 28 minutes or until edges pull away from sides of the pan.
10. Cool completely before sprinkling with powdered sugar just before serving.
Nutrition Information: 1 brownie - Calories 120, Calories From Fat 36, Total Fat 4g, Saturated Fat 1g, Cholesterol 0mg, Sodium 30mg, Total Carbohydrates 20g, Dietary Fiber 1g, Protein 2g.
